full_title: Pharmacotherapy for Dravet Syndrome: A Systematic Review and Network Meta-Analysis of Randomized Controlled Trials

search.pubmed_query: ("Dravet syndrome"[Title/Abstract] OR "severe myoclonic epilepsy in infancy"[Title/Abstract] OR "severe myoclonic epilepsy of infancy"[Title/Abstract] OR "SMEI"[Title/Abstract]) AND (randomized[Title/Abstract] OR randomised[Title/Abstract] OR "controlled trial"[Title/Abstract] OR "clinical trial"[Publication Type] OR "randomized controlled trial"[Publication Type]) AND ("1990/01/01"[PDAT] : "2023/01/28"[PDAT])
search.notes: Reproduces paper's primary search terms from supplementary Appendix I, restricted to PubMed only. Paper also searched EMBASE, Cochrane CENTRAL, ClinicalTrials.gov.

inclusion_criteria.study_design: Randomized, controlled, double- or single-blinded, parallel-group study
inclusion_criteria.population: Participants with a diagnosis of Dravet syndrome (also called severe myoclonic epilepsy in infancy / SMEI), any age, sex, ethnicity
inclusion_criteria.comparator: Placebo, another ASM, or a different dose of the same ASM

exclusion_criteria: Studies not specifically on Dravet syndrome
